title: Cobblemon - Spawn Controller
description: Control what spawns on your server without having to change your datapacks around!
body:
A mod that grants full control over your cobblemon spawns! No more restarting when you keep forgetting to disable those legendary pokemon spawns ;)

For cobblemon 1.6 and above!

Adds 1 command:
- /spawncontroller <enable|disable> <species|biome|world> <the species/biome/world>
